== Notes for [[Item:Q105500|Q105500]] ==

Luke 6:16; Probably the same person as Lebbaes Thaddaeus RIN 7950

Luke 6:13 And when it was day, he called unto him his disciples: and of them he chose twelve, whom aslo he named apostles:
Luke 6:16 And Judas the brother of James,...

David De Graw's question upon reading Luke chapter 6.
Was Judas, the brother of James, an apostle? Thaddaeus is not mentioned among this group. Is Judas also named Thaddaeus? If so, is Thaddaeus the brother of James, the son of Alphaeus? Judas is listed in position 11, where Lebbaes Thaddaeus is also positioned.

Answer Bible Dictionary under Judas
(4) "not Iscariot," one of the 12, also called Judas (son or brother of James (Luke 6:16; John 14:22; Acts 1:13); probably the same as Lebbaeus or Thaddaeus (Matt. 10:3; Mark 3:18).

Luke 6:16; Probably the same person as Lebbaes Thaddaeus RIN 7950

Luke 6:13 And when it was day, he called unto him his disciples: and of them he chose twelve, whom aslo he named apostles:
Luke 6:16 And Judas the brother of James,...

David De Graw's question upon reading Luke chapter 6.
Was Judas, the brother of James, an apostle? Thaddaeus is not mentioned among this group. Is Judas also named Thaddaeus? If so, is Thaddaeus the brother of James, the son of Alphaeus? Judas is listed in position 11, where Lebbaes Thaddaeus is also positioned.

Answer Bible Dictionary under Judas
(4) "not Iscariot," one of the 12, also called Judas (son or brother of James (Luke 6:16; John 14:22; Acts 1:13); probably the same as Lebbaeus or Thaddaeus (Matt. 10:3; Mark 3:18).

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000003242970981

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
